setup.description: Configure S3 session storage, credential gates, a stable machine name, safe default-deny policy, and the global Claude SessionEnd hook.

policy.description: Whitelist, blacklist, or explain repository-specific automatic transcript export decisions.

hook.description: Install, inspect, migrate, or remove the global Claude Code SessionEnd transcript hook.

status.description: Diagnose S3 session config, credentials, repository policy, hook installation, and upload readiness.

share.description: List local Claude sessions or explicitly upload one complete session family to S3.

fullsend.description: Download Fullsend GitHub Actions artifacts on demand, convert them, and upload sessions and provenance to S3.

s3.description: Validate S3 access, discover AgentsView roots, and repair legacy project metadata.

view.description: Start, stop, or rebuild AgentsView for shared team session transcripts.
